patches.summary: Wired parent product-search RunE to fan-out search when positional query arg is present.
patches.reason: The generator emits product-search as a parent group with per-source subcommands. The fan-out novel feature needs the parent command to dispatch concurrent searches across all sources when a bare query is given.

patches.summary: Added Lowe's as stub source with standalone autocomplete and store locator commands.
patches.reason: Printing Press printer protocol (probe-reachability + browser-sniff on Firefox HAR) confirmed autocomplete and store locator are standard_http (User-Agent only, no auth). Product search is SSR behind Akamai; recommendation engine (pythia-recs-svc, 14 endpoints) requires browser session cookies. Lowe's is stub — not in the fan-out — because only utility endpoints (suggest, stores) are viable, not product search.

patches.summary: Added Home Depot as stub with ssr_only transport and assessment notes.
patches.reason: Printing Press printer protocol confirmed all HD endpoints (autocomplete, store finder, GraphQL) return 403. Firefox HAR captured zero www.homedepot.com requests — HD renders everything server-side. No viable path without HTML scraping.

patches.summary: Added missing fergusonhome.com to inferSource domain map (Greptile P1).
patches.reason: Ferguson products from fergusonhome.com were classified as 'unknown' source. Also added lowes.com and homedepot.com domains.

patches.summary: Renamed CLI from home-goat to reno-goat across all files, directories, and module path.
patches.reason: Reviewer feedback on PR #855 — 'home-goat' was too ambiguous for a home renovation/furnishing CLI.

patches.summary: Resolved all Greptile P1 and P2 findings: search_history writes, context propagation, timeout flags, FK cascade, Shopify error pipeline.
patches.reason: Greptile review flagged: search_history never written (P1), HEAD requests ignoring cmd context and --timeout flag (P2), price_history missing ON DELETE CASCADE (P2), Shopify errors bypassing fanout pipeline (P2).

patches.summary: Fixed inferSource to map myshopify.com → shopify-dtc instead of shopify.com → shopify.
patches.reason: Greptile P1: containsDomain checks for '.shopify.com' but Shopify DTC stores use 'myshopify.com' — the char before 'shopify' is 'y' not '.', so the match silently failed. All five DTC stores were classified as 'unknown'.

patches.summary: Added --price and --title flags to watch add; seeds current_price, original_price, and price_history on insert.
patches.reason: Greptile P1: watch add never stored current_price, so the currentPrice.Valid guard in watch check never fired and price_history stayed empty. watch history returned zero rows. The --price flag seeds both the watches row and a baseline price_history entry.
